page.title: Let's talk.
page.subtitle: But first — to make it efficient:

preQualification.heading: Before you write.
preQualification.intro: A few things that can help direct your inquiry:
items: If you're looking for a quote on a simple landing page or a project below mid-level professional scale — with respect, we're not the right partner.
If you need a "developer for a specific task" — that's more suited to a freelance marketplace.
If you're not sure which collaboration model fits — choose "Not sure" in the dropdown and describe your situation.
If you know you want to discuss a serious engagement — proceed to the form. We respond within 2-3 business days.

alternative.heading: Prefer direct email?
alternative.body: Send to dartstudio.team@gmail.com. A helpful subject line: your company name + the collaboration model you're considering.

items.label: Day 1-3
items.body: We read your inquiry. A real person at Dartstudio reads it, not an auto-reply.

items.label: Day 3-7
items.body: We reply — with a calendar link, a clarifying question, or an honest 'not a fit' with a brief reason.

email.label: Email
email.hint: We reply to this same address. No newsletter spam — we don't have one.

collaborationModel.label: Which collaboration model are you interested in?

options.technology-partner: Technology Partner — build a product from scratch
options.architecture-consultant: Architecture Consultant — audit & refactor an existing system
options.not-sure: Not sure — help me find the right fit
options.open-discussion: Open discussion — not a specific engagement yet

message.label: Tell us briefly.
message.hint: Doesn't need to be polished. Your business context, current situation, and what you're hoping for. Min. 50 characters.

budgetRange.label: Budget range in mind (optional)
budgetRange.hint: Optional, but filling this in makes the first conversation more concrete.

startTimeline.label: When are you hoping to start? (optional)

options.asap: As soon as possible / this week

success.label: Sent
success.heading: We've received your inquiry.
success.body: A real person at Dartstudio will read it within 2-3 business days. A confirmation email has been sent to your address.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Try again, or email dartstudio.team@gmail.com directly.
errors.network: Can't connect. Check your connection and try again.
errors.rateLimited: Too many submissions. Please try again in a few minutes.

success.label: Registered
success.body: You're on the waitlist. We'll email you when there's a worthwhile update.

errors.generic: Failed. Please try again in a moment.
